phase_description: Phase 1: advisory-only — all promotions via USER_APPROVAL (ADR-023). Tier routing computed but suppressed.

tier_a.description: Automatic promotion — immediate. All conditions must pass simultaneously.
tier_a.telegram_template:
⚡ AUTO-PROMOTED: {strategy_id} → Production
Sharpe: {sharpe:.2f} | APY: {apy:.1f}% | DD: {dd:.1f}% | Days: {days}
Tier A (all thresholds exceeded, zero halts, no T3-SPEC)
Reply REVERT within 24h to roll back.

tier_b.description: Automatic promotion with 48-hour hold. Silence = proceed.
tier_b.telegram_template:
🕐 PENDING AUTO-PROMOTE: {strategy_id} in 48h
Sharpe: {sharpe:.2f} | APY: {apy:.1f}% | DD: {dd:.1f}%
Tier B (metrics above ADR-023 floor; below Tier A threshold)
Reply CANCEL to stop. Silence = proceed.

tier_c.description: Manual review required. No automated promotion.

notes: Phase 1 (now — 2026-07-11): auto_promote_enabled=false; tier routing is advisory only.
Phase 2 (2026-07-12): flip auto_promote_enabled=true to activate Tier A/B.
Phase 3 (2026-08-01, go-live): Tier C blockers propagate to GoLiveChecker.
approved=False from RiskPolicy cannot be overridden by any tier of this policy.
LLM is forbidden in promotion_engine.py (LLM_FORBIDDEN_AGENTS rule).
Atomic writes required for all state files: tmp + os.replace.
